title: AuditEntry
description: Enterprise audit entry contract for the Heavenly Dreams ecosystem. Every mutation, agent action, n8n workflow execution and permission change must produce an AuditEntry.

action.description: Verb describing the action: create, update, delete, read, login, logout, grant, revoke, trigger, approve, reject

rules.immutability: AuditEntry records must never be deleted or mutated after creation.
rules.correlationId: Every request crossing a platform boundary must carry a correlationId.
rules.agentActions: All agent-initiated mutations must produce an AuditEntry with actorType=agent.
rules.n8nWorkflows: All n8n workflow executions must produce an AuditEntry with actorType=n8n_workflow.
rules.retention: AuditEntry records must be retained for a minimum of 2 years.
